decisions_this_session.rationale: Token budget at 69% of 5h limit. Single-plan small-scope phase didn't need the full pipeline. Saved ~250k tokens.
Save ~100k tokens vs full pipeline; CLAUDE.md hard rule #3 (cut to manual slide if not wired by hour 18) is the actual safety valve.

decisions_this_session.decision: Orphan-step validation check loosened to 'every step has positive step_number'
decisions_this_session.rationale: Original semantic (citation cross-ref OR Skeptic-description match) was too strict for hackathon scope. Phase 5 LITE only enriches Materials, not Protocol rows.

decisions_this_session.decision: Landing page buttons: header + footer ink-black uniform; hero kept gradient shimmer; footer specificity bump (a.l-btn-primary) to beat .landing-root a
decisions_this_session.rationale: User design preference for visual uniformity across the 3 Open-Sextant buttons.

production_state: DEPLOYED + WORKING. /api/qc returns verdict + 3 cited sources in ~3.8s. /api/plan returns full Plan JSON in ~5s on cache miss. Materials rows now carry clickable [N sources] citations with native tooltip. User confirmed end-to-end test of chip h1 (CRP biosensor) succeeds: verdict + 5-tab plan canvas + Tavily-grounded materials all visible.
next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 7 --auto --skip-verify to plan + execute Phase 7 (closed-loop corrections). Estimated cost: ~250k tokens. Alternative for tighter budget: tell Claude 'draft Phase 7 PLAN.md inline like Phase 5 LITE' — drops to ~150k but more error-prone for a phase this complex.
context_notes: Phase 4 + Phase 5 LITE just shipped end-to-end. The 5-tab Plan canvas is live (Protocol/Materials/Budget/Timeline/Validation). Materials citations are clickable. Validation grid orphan-step check now passes. Trace rail no longer has overlapping labels in pre-submit state. Landing page has 3 uniform black Open-Sextant buttons (hero keeps the gradient shimmer; header + footer matched to ink). Phase 7 IS the moat moment — closed-loop corrections via 'Correct' action only (Challenge/Annotate cut per hard rule #3), typed lab-rule extraction to data/lab_rules.json, re-injection into agent prompts on next hypothesis, side-by-side diff modal showing Plan A vs Plan B with changed lines highlighted. Pre-stage 2 demo hypotheses where the same rule applies to both. The full demo flow proves the closed loop. Phase 8 is mostly user-driven (cache-warm 4 chips, record screencast, fill submission form). Submission deadline is ~2026-04-26 13:00 ET. ~3h headroom from this handoff.

must_have: Click any plan line → 'Correct' popover (no Challenge/Annotate)
Submit → POST /api/lab-rules → typed rule extracted via 1 Gemini call
Header pill 'N lab rules' updates from 0 → 1
On NEXT plan generation, GET lab rules + inject into agent prompts (Researcher + Operator + Skeptic + Compliance)
Pre-stage 2 demo hypotheses where the same rule applies to both
After Plan B renders, 'Compare with previous plan' button → modal with side-by-side Plan A vs Plan B + changed-lines highlighted in clay/rust accent
deferred_per_DEFERRED_md: Lab profile drawer (LOOP-05 — list all rules + counts + edit/delete)
Per-line rule labels in diff modal (PROP-04)

session_token_summary: Heavy session. 4 background subagent spawns (planner + checker + 2 executors for Phase 4) plus inline Phase 5 LITE execution + 5 UI fix commits. ~600-700k tokens consumed. Remaining 5h budget headroom: ~30%. Strategy for Phase 7+8: inline-write what we can, skip plan-checker, no /gsd-resume-work between phases until Phase 8.
